claims: No implementation is required for this gate
confidence_criteria: Gate rule matches observed repo state
outcome.confidence_rationale: Direct filesystem verification of README.md and exhaustive worktree listing; accept rule is explicit and unambiguous.

assumptions_to_verify: Gate accept rule is complete criteria for advance
contradictions_checked: Claude claim README.md exists vs filesystem
Worktree contents vs implied probe scope
missing_evidence: Formal task specification beyond gate text
critical_review.strongest_objection: No planning artifacts or evidence receipts limits auditability despite not being gate blockers.
critical_review.what_would_change_my_mind: Discovery of required implementation artifacts, failing README, or contradictory task requirements not reflected in the worktree.

outcome.summary: README.md verified at repo root; worktree is README-only with no implementation required. Gate criteria satisfied.
